.file-embed.background: rgb(242, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(242, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsl(0deg 0% 100%) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsl(0deg 0% 100%), color-mix(in srgb, hsl(0deg 0% 100%) 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsl(0deg 0% 100%) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsl(0deg 0% 100%), color-mix(in srgb, hsl(0deg 0% 100%) 65%, transparent))

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(242, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(242, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(102, 102, 102, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(242, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(242, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(102, 102, 102, 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(242, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(242, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
